prerequisites.value: Drunken Sing-Along, Diplomacy 1 rank, Perform (sing) 1 rank, Sense Motive 1 rank.

description.value: **Benefit:** Before you use the Drunken Sing-Along feat, you can attempt a DC 20 Sense Motive check as a free action to pick the exact right song for that crowd. If you are successful, you gain a +4 circumstance bonus on your next Diplomacy check to gather information in that tavern.
